title: saussurea diffusa
intro: Saussurea diffusa, also known as Saussurea costus or Khas, is a perennial plant native to the Himalayan region, known for its rhizome and roots. The medicinal properties of Saussurea diffusa are attributed to its sesquiterpene compounds, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Saussurea diffusa can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is also used in traditional medicine, Ayurveda, and Unani practices.
